zh.lifeSummary: 當Anna White於1600年7月13日出生在英國艾可沙爾福德時，她的父親Robert White of Messing41歲，母親Bridget Allgar38歲。她於1620年10月18日與John Porter of Windsor Connecticut在英國艾可梅希結婚。他們至少是5個兒子和6個女兒的父母。她於1639年住在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加康涅狄格州溫莎女爵。她去世於1647年5月11日在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加康涅狄格州哈特福德溫莎女爵享年46歲，埋葬在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加康涅狄格州哈特福德溫莎女爵。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Anna White于1600年7月13日出生在英国艾可沙爾福德时，她的父亲Robert White of Messing41岁，母亲Bridget Allgar38岁。她于1620年10月18日与John Porter of Windsor Connecticut在英国艾可梅希结婚。他们至少是5个儿子和6个女儿的父母。她于1639年住在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加康涅狄格州溫莎女爵。她去世于1647年5月11日在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加康涅狄格州哈特福德溫莎女爵享年46岁，埋葬在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加康涅狄格州哈特福德溫莎女爵。

nameMeanings.name: White
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: from Middle English white, wit (Old English hwīt ‘white’), hence a nickname for someone with white hair or a pale complexion. In some cases it is perhaps from a Middle English survival of the Old English personal name Hwīta, a short form of names in Hwīt- (from hwīt ‘white’). The name may also be topographic, referring to someone who lived by a bend or curve in a river or road (from Old English wiht ‘bend’), the source of the placename of Great Whyte in Ramsey, Huntingdonshire (compare Wight ). This name is also a variant of Wight . The surname White is also very common among African Americans.

Irish and Scottish: adopted for any of several Irish and Scottish Gaelic names based on bán ‘white, fair’ (see Bain 1, McElwain ) or fionn ‘fair’ (see Finn 1). The English surname has been Gaelicized in Ireland as de Faoite.

Americanized form (translation into English) of various European surnames meaning ‘white’, for example German Weiss , French Blanc , Polish Białas (see Bialas ), Slovenian Belec , or any other synonymous Slavic surname beginning with Bel-, Bev-, Biel- or Bil-.

variants.name: Whitty
meanings: topographic name denoting a ‘dweller by the white hedge or the white (forest) enclosure’, from Middle English whit ‘white’ (Old English hwīt) + heie ‘hedge, enclosure’ (Old English (ge)hæg and Old French haie) perhaps in reference to whitethorn (hawthorn) hedging. This English name has been recorded in Ireland (Wexford) since the 13th century. It has been Gaelicized as de Faoite, see also White .
nickname from Middle English whit ‘white’ + eie ‘eye’ (Old English hwīt + ēage). Compare Blackie 2 and Greeney .
variant of   Witty  , with which this surname may have been confused.

variants.name: Whitson
meanings: English and Scottish (Midlothian): from an unrecorded Middle English personal name Whiteson, literally ‘white son’ or perhaps ‘son of someone named White ’. Occasionally, a variant of Whiston .

variants.name: Whitt
meanings: English (Nottinghamshire): variant of   White  .
Possibly also an Americanized form of German   Witt  .

variants.name: McQuitty
meanings: Irish (northern): Anglicized form of Gaelic Mac Fhaoitigh, a patronymic from a Gaelicization of English White . See also McWhite .

variants.name: Whitecotton
meanings: Apparently a compound of   White   +   Cotton  , but the history is obscure.

variants.name: McElwain
meanings: Scottish and Irish: Anglicized form of Gaelic Mac Giolla Bháin (Irish) or Mac Gille Bháin (Scottish) ‘son of the fair-haired lad’, often translated into English as White or Whyte but otherwise indistinguishable, once Anglicized, from Scottish Gaelic Mac Gille Bheathain in 2 below. Compare Kilbane .
Scottish: Anglicized form of Gaelic Mac Gille Bheathain ‘son of the servant (i.e. devotee) of (Saint) Beathan’, a personal name representing a diminutive of beatha ‘life’. Compare McBain .

variants.name: McWhite
meanings: Irish: partly translated Anglicized form of Gaelic Mac Faoitigh, a patronymic from a Gaelic form of English White .

variants.name: Wight
meanings: Scottish and English: nickname from Middle English wiht, wight ‘agile, nimble, strong, brave’ (Old Norse víg with the Old Norse neuter suffix -t, for which compare the word scant), or from the corresponding Older Scots word wicht. Possibly sometimes a nickname from Middle English wight ‘living creature; small portion or thing’, or from the corresponding Older Scots word wicht.

English: habitational name from the Isle of Wight. The island is recorded as Vectis (its Latin name) c. 150 AD . Its name derives from a British word, perhaps related to Welsh gwaith ‘turn, course’, meaning ‘place of the division’, in reference to the island's position in the Solent.
English and Scottish: variant of   White  .

variants.name: Whites
meanings: English: variant of White with genitive or post-medieval excrescent -s.

variants.name: Whitman
meanings: English (southern): from the Middle English personal name Whytman (Old English Hwītmann, from hwīt ‘white’ + mann ‘man’). Compare White 1 and also Wightman , with which this surname was probably confused.
History: John Whitman settled in Weymouth, MA, c. 1638. The poet Walt Whitman (1819–92) was descended from Joseph Whitman, who had settled in Stratford, CT, from England around 1660.

nameMeanings.name: Anna
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: variant of Anne , in common use as a given name in most European languages. Among people with a classical education, it has from time to time been associated with Virgil's Aeneid, where it is borne by the sister of Dido , Queen of Carthage. This Phoenician name may ultimately be of Semitic origin, and thus related to the biblical Anne. However, the connection, if it exists, is indirect rather than direct.

variants.name: Anne
meanings: Pet form of   Ann   or   Anne .

historicEvents.title: The Pilgrims Board the Mayflower
historicEvents.description: "The Pilgrims boarded the Mayflower in search of religious freedom in the New World in September 1620. The Mayflower set sail from Plymouth, England, with 102 passengers, 40 of whom called themselves ""Saints."" After two stormy months at sea, the ship reached the New World. Nearly half of the group died during their first winter due to malnutrition and the harsh New England winter."

historicEvents.title: The English Civil War
historicEvents.description: A series of conflicts regarding England's governance during the years 1642 to 1651 is now known as The English Civil War. Charles I summoned supporters to join him against his enemies in Parliament. In October 1642, nearly 10,000 men fought for Charles I and chased Parliament across the River Tamar. Fighting continued for years and was finally ended at the Battle of Worcester on September 3, 1651, with a Parliamentarian victory.

en.lifeSummary: When Anna White was born on 13 July 1600, in Shalford, Essex, England, her father, Robert White of Messing, was 41 and her mother, Bridget Allgar, was 38. She married John Porter of Windsor Connecticut on 18 October 1620, in Messing, Essex, England. They were the parents of at least 5 sons and 6 daughters. She lived in Windsor, Connecticut Colony, British Colonial America in 1639. She died on 11 May 1647, in Windsor, Hartford, Connecticut Colony, British Colonial America, at the age of 46, and was buried in Windsor, Hartford, Connecticut Colony, British Colonial America.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Anna White est née le 13 juillet 1600, à Shalford, Essex, Angleterre, son père, Robert White of Messing, avait 41 ans et sa mère, Bridget Allgar, avait 38 ans. Elle a épousé John Porter of Windsor Connecticut le 18 octobre 1620, à Messing, Essex, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 5 fils et 6 filles. Elle a vécu à Windsor, Connecticut Colony, Amérique coloniale britannique en 1639. Elle est décédée le 11 mai 1647, à Windsor, Hartford, Connecticut Colony, Amérique coloniale britannique, à l’âge de 46 ans, et a été enterrée à Windsor, Hartford, Connecticut Colony, Amérique coloniale britannique.

de.lifeSummary: Als Anna White am 13. Juli 1600 in Shalford, Essex, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Robert White of Messing 41 und ihre Mutter Bridget Allgar 38. Sie hat am 18. Oktober 1620 in Messing, Essex, England John Porter of Windsor Connecticut geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 5 Söhne und 6 Töchter. 1639 hat sie in Windsor, Connecticut Colony, British Colonial America gelebt. Sie starb am 11. Mai 1647 im Alter von 46 Jahren in Windsor, Hartford, Connecticut Colony, British Colonial America und wurde in Windsor, Hartford, Connecticut Colony, British Colonial America begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Anna White è nata il il 13 luglio 1600 nel Shalford, Essex, England, sua padre, Robert White of Messing, aveva 41 anni e sua madre, Bridget Allgar, aveva 38 anni. Lei sposato John Porter of Windsor Connecticut il 18 ottobre 1620, nel Messing, Essex, England. Erano genitori di almeno 5 figli e 6 figlie. Vissuto a Windsor, Connecticut Colony, British Colonial America nel 1639. ja.lifeSummary: Anna Whiteが1600年7月13日にイギリスエセックスシャルフォードで生まれた時，父Robert White of Messingは41歳，母Bridget Allgarは38歳であった。1620年10月18日にイギリスエセックスメシングでJohn Porter of Windsor Connecticutと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも5人の息子と6人の娘の親であった。彼女は1639年にはイギリス植民地アメリカコネチカット州ウィンドソルに住んでいた。彼女は1647年5月11日にイギリス植民地アメリカコネチカット州ハートフォードウィンドソルで46歳で死去し，イギリス植民地アメリカコネチカット州ハートフォードウィンドソルにて埋葬された。

ko.Windsor, Connecticut Colony, British Col: 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 코네티컷 주 윈드소르
ko.lifeSummary: Anna White(이)가 1600년 7월 13일 영국 에세스 샤퍼드에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Robert White of Messing(은)는 41세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Bridget Allgar(은)는 38세였다. 그녀는 1620년 10월 18일 영국 에세스 메징에서 John Porter of Windsor Connecticut(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 다섯 명의 아들과 여섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 1639년도에 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 코네티컷 주 윈드소르에서 살았다. 그녀는 1647년 5월 11일 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 코네티컷 주 하트퍼드 윈드소르에서 46세의 나이로 사망했으며 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 코네티컷 주 하트퍼드 윈드소르에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Anna White nasceu em 13 de julho de 1600, em Shalford, Essex, Inglaterra, seu pai, Robert White of Messing, tinha 41 anos e sua mãe, Bridget Allgar, tinha 38 anos. Ela casou-se com John Porter of Windsor Connecticut em 18 de outubro de 1620, em Messing, Essex, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 5 filhos e 6 filhas. Ela viveu em Windsor, Conecticute, British Colonial America em 1639. Ela faleceu em 11 de maio de 1647, em Windsor, Hartford, Conecticute, British Colonial America, com 46 anos, e foi sepultada em Windsor, Hartford, Conecticute, British Colonial America.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Anna White родилась 13 июля 1600 г. в местности шэлфорд, эссекс, Англия, её отцу по имени Robert White of Messing было 41 год, а матери, которую звали Bridget Allgar, 38. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени John Porter of Windsor Connecticut 18 октября 1620 г. в местности мессинг, эссекс, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 5 сыновей и 6 дочерей. Она жила в местности виндзор, Коннектикут, бритиш колоняль амирика в 1639 году. Она умерла 11 мая 1647 г. в местности виндзор, хартфорд, Коннектикут, бритиш колоняль амирика в возрасте 46 лет и была похоронена в местности виндзор, хартфорд, Коннектикут, бритиш колоняль амирика.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Anna White nació el 13 de julio de 1600, en Shalford, Essex, Inglaterra, su papá, Robert White of Messing, tenía 41 años y su mamá, Bridget Allgar, tenía 38 años. Se casó con John Porter of Windsor Connecticut el 18 de octubre de 1620, en Messing, Essex, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 5 hijos y 6 hijas. Vivió en Windsor, Connecticut Colony, British Colonial America en 1639. Murió el 11 de mayo de 1647, en Windsor, Hartford, Connecticut Colony, British Colonial America, a la edad de 46 años, y fue sepultada en Windsor, Hartford, Connecticut Colony, British Colonial America.
